content:
DEAL NOTE
Customer: Harmon Retail Group
Customer ID: C005
Contract ID: K016
Account Executive: James Okafor
Deal Type: Renewal + Expansion
Date: November 1, 2024

DEAL SUMMARY
Renewed Harmon Retail Group with expansion from 50 to 60 users. No discount. New ARR: $54,000.

RENEWAL NOTES
Expansion reflects the addition of the distribution center team, as anticipated. Sandra Harmon remains a strong champion and has referenced the platform positively in two industry events. She proactively reached out to initiate the renewal conversation in September 2024, six weeks before contract end.

NEGOTIATION NOTES
No discount requested. Sandra did ask about volume pricing for a potential future expansion to their franchise partners, which is not something we currently offer. James Okafor flagged this to the product and pricing teams.

EXPANSION POTENTIAL
Franchise partner access could be a significant expansion opportunity. Sandra estimated 30-40 franchise locations that could benefit from a read-only access tier. Flag for 2025 roadmap conversation.
